name: Pin Prai
overview: Pin Prai is a medical student who desperately dreams of becoming a doctor. However, she is forced to leave her studies in order to take care of the family business - an elephant farm. She has a hard time in the new place, but Kritsada - the heir to a resort that cooperates with her farm - helps her in everything. Nobody knows about his real identity,because he is forced to disguise himself. Gradually, Pin Prai and Kritsada fall in love with each other.

trailers.title: ปิ่นไพร [Official Teaser] Ver.2
